---
title: "Stanislas Rigal"
description-meta: "Personal website"
image: "files/images/placeholder4.JPG"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3180-4592
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.fr/citations?user=mLe9EecAAAAJ&hl=fr&oi=ao
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Stanislas-Rigal-2
      target: _blank
---

:::{#hero-heading}



:::
